title: 2026-07-01 Reykjavik Milky Blue Geothermal Pool
summary: Reykjavik cool-summer geothermal pool set using milky blue across a Laugardalslaug-style public pool, Karsnes harbor lagoon, Sundholl-style post-swim layering, and old harbor pool-bag transit.
summaryJa: レイキャビクのアルバム。色の軸はミルキーブルー。構成はstudio-sports、水辺、街歩き。

images.alt: Early-20s Japanese-centered woman seated on the edge of a Laugardalslaug-style Reykjavik public geothermal pool on a cool July morning, tightening her goggles with one foot in warm water, wearing a milky blue square-neck athletic one-piece swimsuit, smoky gray pool robe slipped from one shoulder, waterproof slide sandals, small towel loop, and silver studs
images.title: 01 Swim Laugardalslaug goggles
images.locationDetail: edge of a Laugardalslaug-style Reykjavik public geothermal pool on a cool July morning

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman waist-deep in a Reykjavik / Karsnes harbor-style oceanfront geothermal lagoon, gathering a cream wool wrap near black volcanic rock, turf-like wall, gray-blue water, pale steam, and North Atlantic horizon, wearing a deep teal milky-blue ribbed high-neck one-piece swimsuit, black waterproof sandals nearby, small matte silver earrings, and wet hair in a low knot
images.title: 02 Resort Karsnes lagoon wrap
images.locationDetail: Reykjavik / Karsnes harbor-style oceanfront geothermal lagoon

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman on a Sundholl Reykjavik-style historic pool deck after swimming, pulling cropped black technical trousers over a milky blue square-neck swimsuit used as a bodysuit, with a charcoal long hooded rain coat worn open, ivory towel scarf, waterproof black clogs, compact wet pouch, white pool facade, tiled deck, and steam behind her
images.title: 03 Outerwear Sundholl layering

images.alt: Adult 18-19 Japanese-centered woman walking along a Reykjavik old harbor waterfront path after visiting a neighborhood geothermal pool, holding a cream fisherman-knit cardigan closed against the wind and carrying a mesh pool bag with towel and swimsuit pouch, wearing a pale milky-blue swimsuit as a bodysuit, slate nylon knee-length wrap skirt over bike shorts, thick white sport socks, black waterproof sneakers, and a simple beanie
images.title: 04 Transit Old Harbor pool bag
